name: Nicholas Genco
title: Senior Platform Software Engineer
headline: Senior Platform Software Engineer at Oracle focused on scalable UI architecture, React/Preact ecosystems, TypeScript, Web Components, accessibility, performance, and enterprise UI modernization.
summary: My focus is modernizing legacy systems into maintainable, reusable ecosystems using the React/Preact stack, TypeScript, and RESTful services.
I specialize in design system engineering, performance optimization, and component libraries that accelerate development at scale.

experience.title: Senior Platform Software Engineer
bullets: Built and stabilized accessible JET components across TreeView, TreeTable, DataGrid, and related collection patterns.
Improved keyboard, drag-and-drop, virtualization, and progressive loading behavior for complex enterprise UI components.
Expanded automated test coverage across Karma Mocha, QUnit, Playwright-style browser tests, and cross-browser workflows.
Partnered with design, accessibility, QA, and component owners to refine reusable UI patterns and ship reliable fixes across release branches.

experience.title: Senior Member of Technical Staff
bullets: Modernized Oracle's enterprise UI ecosystem by converting legacy Knockout/JET modules into scalable ES6/TypeScript and Preact Web Components.
Delivered a reusable component library used across 20+ internal enterprise teams, reducing duplicated logic and increasing developer velocity.
Engineered high-performance client-side components for real-time data rendering, responsive interaction, and strict enterprise accessibility requirements.

experience.title: Member of Technical Staff
bullets: Refactored legacy UI systems into flexible shared components aligned with scalable frontend architecture standards.
Led interns converting large JET/JavaScript modules to TypeScript, improving type safety and toolchain consistency across multiple teams.
Partnered with UI architects to streamline patterns for reusable components and internal design standards.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built accessible enterprise UI components with end-to-end design participation.
Implemented scalable UI enhancements and resolved production defects across customer-facing modules.
Prototyped lazy-loading data providers that were leveraged in high-scale environments.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed front-end modules for aviation asset management platforms used by enterprise clients.
Ensured compatibility across multiple hardware and third-party integrations.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Built web modules for the Magento and Joomla platforms.
Created relational databases used for shipping, inventory, and e-commerce.
Served as a system administrator for a large e-commerce business.
